name: Buttery Black Walnut Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook sugar, corn syrup and water until the sugar dissolves and the mixture comes to a boil.
2. Add butter; cook until the mixture reaches 280°F on a candy thermometer.
3. Stir in walnuts; cook until the mixture reaches 300°F (hard crack stage).
4. Remove from the heat and stir in baking soda.
5. Spread immediately into a greased 15x10x1-inch baking pan.
6. Allow to cool completely, then break into pieces.
Yield: 1 1/4 pounds
